summary: Iteration 41: PageSpeed optimization features fully tested. All optimizations working: Cloudinary transforms (w_1200,q_auto,f_auto,c_limit) applied to product card images, LCP image has fetchpriority='high' and loading='eager', preconnect to Cloudinary CDN in document head, fonts loaded via <link> tags (not @import), CLS prevention with inline font-family style. Navigation between pages works. Video hover on product cards works. Stock sauna modal from iteration 40 still works.

issues: <link rel=preload> uses an unsupported `as` value - video preload links use as='video' which some browsers don't support (minor, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: optimizedImg() in utils.js correctly adds Cloudinary transforms (w_1200,q_auto,f_auto,c_limit) to image URLs
ProductCard component correctly sets fetchPriority='high' and loading='eager' for LCP image (isLCP=true)
ProductCard correctly sets loading='lazy' for non-LCP images
Fonts loaded via <link> tags in index.html, @import removed from index.css
Inline <style> in index.html sets font-family for CLS prevention
robots.txt exists in public folder (note: on preview env, CDN overrides this - expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PageSpeed optimizations are fully implemented. Key features: 1) Cloudinary transforms on product card images (w_1200 desktop, w_800 mobile, q_auto, f_auto, c_limit), 2) LCP image (Sauna card) has fetchpriority='high' and loading='eager', 3) Balia card has loading='lazy', 4) Preconnect to res.cloudinary.com in head, 5) Fonts via <link> tags not @import, 6) CLS prevention via inline font-family style. Stock sauna modal on /sauny page still works correctly.
